svg.title: GOLDEN BRIDGE — static layout snapshot
svg.desc: Rendered from ring4_canvas::render::layout on the empty board. Static fallback for the wasm-backed canvas UI.
svg.text: Hypothesis-discovery puzzle. NOT a proven Theory of Everything.
Goal: light the bridge stones by picking pairs — one BLUE Data tile + one PURPLE Geometry tile.
Watch the bridge stone light up. Avoid red — it cracks the bridge!
GOLDEN BRIDGE — integrity: EMPTY bridge strength: +0.000 compression: 0%
Pick a BLUE tile, then a PURPLE tile to begin.
Honesty panel — bridge strength is NOT proof of physics.
bridge total = +0.000 worst claim: VERIFIED bridge: EMPTY
